content.en:
In front of the stone tower of the ruins.

The Xinghai Great Ancestor came here and said, "I want to trade a Black God Armor Stone with Your Excellency, which is 100,000 Void Silver Water!"

I saw that the Star Sea Ancestor took out a Void Ball, which contained 100,000 regiments of Void Silver Water.

Ye Tian sensed it a little and confirmed the authenticity of these Void Silver Waters.

"Sure enough, it's 100,000 regiments of Void Silver Water!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

It's easier than trading in the empty galaxy!

At best, the Voidless Galaxy is just a treasure land in the Xuanqi Realm, and the most powerful overlord in it can't even enter the Infinite Blood List, far inferior to the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea, let alone compared to the Xuanqi Pavilion, it is simply not a level.

That is, the Voidless Galaxy is in a remote area, and the Xuanqi Pavilion has not paid much attention to it, which has caused the Voidless Galaxy to become an extremely dangerous place in the surrounding area.

"Okay, I'll make a deal with you!"

Ye Tian smiled.

The two seemed to forget the previous conflict and unhappiness, and began to trade.

I saw that Ye Tian's incarnation took out a black god armor stone from the ruin stone tower, and the Xinghai Great Ancestor did not snatch it, but traded honestly.

After all, this place belongs to the scope of the Ruined Stone Tower, if he snatches it, Ye Tian's copy body can be shot with a single thought, and he may not be able to snatch it.

Therefore, he did not dare to take risks.

The two made an oath of origin in the Xuanqi Territory, and as long as it was within the scope of the Xuanqi Territory, this oath could be fulfilled.

After making an oath, they began to exchange items to complete the transaction.

"It's here!"

Ye Tian quickly returned to the Ruins Stone Tower with 100,000 Void Silver Water, while the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea also returned to the Xuanqi Pavilion with the Black God Armor Stone.

......

Ruins of stone towers.

Ye Tian looked at the 100,000 Void Silver Water in his hand, and immediately began to fuse these Void Silver Water.

Eighteen regiments of Void Silver Water could be fused into a single Void Gold Water, so these 100,000 Void Silver Waters could be fused into 5,555 Void Gold Water.

More than 5,000 Void Gold Water, what a large amount, if it is used to impact the fourth stage, there is a great hope that the impact will succeed.

Third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms like the Star Sea Great Ancestor and the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor were also trying to gather resources for the fourth stage of impact, but they were still far from being able to get together.

And Ye Tian only spent a Black God Armor Stone to get it, which is really a big profit!

"If Xuanqi Pavilion knew that I had this ability, he would definitely not trade the Void Silver Water to me!" Ye Tian muttered.

Genki Pavilion.

After the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea came back, he immediately refined the Black God Armor Stone, and soon succeeded in refining the Black God Armor Stone.

Airplanes!!!

The Black God Armor was petrified into a set of defensive armor that completely protected the Star Sea Great Ancestor, and then he began to test the effect of this set of defensive armor.

I saw that the Star Sea Great Ancestor let a group of Xuanqi Pavilion's third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms attack him.

Thundered!!!!

The attacks of a high-level immeasurable lifeform landed on his defensive armor, completely resisted, and did not cause him any damage in the slightest.

"It's such a powerful black god armor stone, you can only feel its horror when you wear it! At the beginning, I encountered a high-level immeasurable lifeform that was much weaker than me, and I couldn't kill him with all my might. Now, I finally have a set of Black God Armor Stones!" said Xinghai Great Ancestor excitedly.

And with the example of the successful transaction of the Xinghai Great Ancestor, other forces also traded with Ye Tian one after another.

For example, the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor also came, and he didn't have a Black God Armor Stone, so Jiuyang Sea prepared 100,000 Void Silver Water, allowing him to trade a Black God Armor Stone.

And Ye Tian is also happy to trade, and will not refuse any transaction from the Great Ancestor.

In this way, Ye Tian used the Black God Armor Stones in his hand to trade a large amount of Void Silver Water.

And his replica body continued to fuse these void silver water inside the ruin stone tower, turning into a cloud of void gold water.

......

Somewhere in the territory of Genki.

The Blood Ancestor was healing, and after he came out of the ruins stone tower, he was still attacked, but fortunately, he had the Black God Armor Stone to protect himself, plus other treasures to protect himself, so he escaped by luck.

Although he has been healing, he also has some eyes and ears that let him know the information of the outside world.

In particular, he has been paying attention to the information of the Ruined Stone Tower.

"It's really amazing that the Endless Great Ancestor actually controlled the Ruined Stone Tower! When he helped me break through the seal, he was obviously still very weak, and he only fought with me in the weak period. I didn't expect the current strength to be so demonic, and the growth rate was too fast. He can't really become that person's disciple, can't he, that one is so arrogant and elusive, no one can find him, it's impossible for the Endless Ancestor to become that person's disciple!"

The Blood Ancestor thought about it for a long time, but he didn't understand why Ye Tian had grown so fast.

However, Ye Tian was now trading the Black God Armor Stone for Void Silver Water, and he didn't understand this operation.

The Black God Armor Stone is so precious, it can almost make a top-level third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform invincible in the third stage!

And the Void Silver Water, what kind of spicy chicken is that, he can't even look down on it, it's just that it has some use for the weak third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and its value is very limited.

"It's weird!"

The Blood Ancestor muttered.

Immediately, he continued to heal and no longer think about it.

......

Inside the Ruins Stone Tower.

All the Black God Armor Stones on Ye Tian's body were traded, and in exchange for a large amount of Void Silver Water, after he turned these Void Silver Waters into Void Gold Water, it was enough for him to cultivate for a long time.

In short, there is no shortage of Void Gold Water needed to refine immeasurable blood to the limit.

In the years that followed, he began to condense immeasurable blood with all his strength and refine immeasurable blood to the limit.

All the time, his cultivation and strength are growing rapidly.

20,000 drops of immeasurable blood!

30,000 drops of immeasurable blood!

40,000 drops of immeasurable blood!

There are a lot of treasures inside the ruin stone tower that can help him condense immeasurable blood in a short period of time, such as the Blood Geng Source Crystal, if there are enough Blood Geng Source Crystals, he can condense 129,600 drops of immeasurable blood in a short period of time.

However, there are currently only seven Blood Geng Source Crystals in the Ruins Stone Tower, but they can also increase tens of thousands of immeasurable blood.

It was not very difficult for him to increase the immeasurable blood, but it would take time to refine the immeasurable blood to the limit and improve its quality to the upper limit.

And Ye Tian's main time was spent refining immeasurable blood, if he didn't quench immeasurable blood to the upper limit, he wouldn't condense a large amount of immeasurable blood, otherwise it would affect the subsequent tempering.

In the blink of an eye, tens of millions of years have passed.

this day.

Some of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms of some forces began to move, after all, there were too many good things in the ruins stone tower, and they were naturally excited!

Moreover, they had a high probability of being sure that Ye Tian did not have a strong force behind him, otherwise they would not have come to occupy the Ruined Stone Tower so far.

"It is very likely that this mysterious Great Ancestor has just obtained the legacy or inheritance of the strong, so that he is so powerful, he is just a lucky guy!"

A fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform asserted.
